storySubtitle: A MY MY HERO ACADEMIA TALE

storyDialogue.text: Initialization complete. Use ‣ AUTO for progression. Warning: Sensory dampeners active. Experience the transition from [dread] to [light].
[shadows] Day 1,826. The fluorescent lights hum a low, mocking funeral march. Your skin is a patchwork of scars and Quirk-grafts that don't belong to you.
Don't look so [glitch] pathetic. You are a masterpiece of biological engineering! A vessel for the future! Who cares if your mind is a little... frayed?
The needle descends. You've forgotten the color of the sky. You've forgotten your own name. You are only 'Subject Zero,' a tool for a war you'll never see.
[shake] BOOM. The reinforced steel door doesn't slide open—it’s ripped from its hinges. The sterile silence is shattered by the sound of boots on glass.
Clear the floor! If it moves and it's wearing a lab coat, kick it through the wall! [impact] We've got a live one in the tank!
[drain] Eyes on me. Don't try to use your Quirk—I'm erasing it for your own safety. Your body can't handle the output yet. Just... breathe. We're getting you out of this hellhole.
You recoil. For years, hands have only brought pain. But this man’s grip is firm, steady, and strangely... careful.
[blink] Sunlight. It's too bright. It hurts. You're in a room that smells of antiseptic, but also... freshly cut grass? The hum of the city replaces the hum of the lab.
You're awake! Please, don't try to move. The doctors at U.A. are working to stabilize the grafts. You're safe now. I promise... no one is going to hurt you ever again.
He looks at you with a terrifying amount of empathy. It’s a sharp contrast to the cold, calculating eyes of the Doctor. For the first time in years, the dread in your chest starts to thaw.
The Special Extraction Project was designed for cases like yours. You aren't a weapon anymore. You're a person. It's going to be a long road... but you aren't walking it in a cage.
The choice is no longer about survival. It's about what comes after the nightmare. Will you use the power they forced upon you to protect others, or will you simply learn how to live again?
